reviews.author: Matthew Mills
reviews.text: A great spot for quick tacos. The fish tacos are only $1.39, taste great, and are very filling. I usually get those every time because it is such a great deal but I also got a carne asada taco and it did not disappoint. It was crowded and parking was hard but those are good signs when you want great food. I got three tacos and left full. I ate one fish taco before I took the picture because I was hungry.

reviews.author: Elliana Calvillo
reviews.text: El Pueblo is a fantastic spot! The food is consistently delicious, offering a wide range of authentic Mexican flavors that keep me coming back for more. I’m always impressed by the quality of the ingredients and the care that goes into each dish. What truly sets El Pueblo apart, though, is the exceptional service. Tania, in particular, always greets us with a smile and goes above and beyond to make sure we have a great experience. Her recommendations are always spot-on, and her friendly demeanor makes the whole atmosphere even more welcoming. If you’re in Cardiff and craving genuine Mexican cuisine with top-notch service, El Pueblo is the place to be!

reviews.author: Warren Nickerson
reviews.text: $1.39 Full Size Fish Tacos, Corn or Flour, (not street taco mini size)...@ 150lbs 3-4 of these have been the most i have managed to conquer! OPEN Daily & 24HRS. Skip the cereal or bagel, These fish Tacos are amazing for Breakfast, Lunch, Dinner or Midnight Snack! ~as of 1/13/2026~

reviews.author: Bryce Kreiser
reviews.text: A favorite spot for sure! Love the fish tacos deal. Service is always kind and fast, and Arturo was especially helpful today. Anthony & Jeremiah too.

reviews.author: norma daniela lepe trillo
reviews.text: Everything was perfect since i walked in, Aylinn was a big help while i was going through the menu and the cooks (Fabian and Iracema) did an awesome job cuz it was delicious 💕

reviews.author: Jo M
reviews.text: I used to order from here a lot, but it’s been a while. I recently ordered fish tacos with a side of fries. The fish tacos were on point and really good. However, I was disappointed with the fries — for $4.19, the portion was very small and barely filled the container. Definitely not worth the price.

reviews.author: Carlos Robles
reviews.text: This is a must if you are in the area!  The fish tacos are so delicious! And you can't beat the price anywhere on southern california! Every time I am in Carlsbad, I stop by El Pueblo! 5 stars all the way!🌟 🌟 🌟 🌟 🌟

reviews.author: Ewan
reviews.text:
I recently had a great experience at El Pueblo Mexican Restaurant. From the moment I walked in, the atmosphere felt warm and welcoming, with colorful décor and the kind of lively energy you hope for in a good Mexican spot. The food absolutely delivered the portions were generous without sacrificing quality. Everything tasted homemade, and you could tell real care went into the preparation.

A big part of the experience was the outstanding service from Chris. Chris was friendly, attentive, and made sure everything came out quickly and exactly as ordered.

reviews.author: Tom V
reviews.text: I got the $1.39 fish tacos. It was a large taco! They gave you a nice piece of fish wrapped in your choice of corn or flour tortilla. I ordered four tacos and after eating them I was full!

reviews.author: Princess Smartypants
reviews.text: Wow this place is incredible.  The service was friendly, the food was delicious and the prices are great!!  The fish tacos were wonderful and the carnitas tacos!!  Highly recommend.

carmel-valley.name: El Pueblo Mexican Food & Bar - Carmel Valley

reviews.author: Brandon Nolte
reviews.text: I underestimated this place. The meats were well seasoned, the taco bar was thoughtfully stocked, and the staff was warm and efficient. For the quality, it is an excellent value. The only puzzling note was the generic signage out front, which hides a spot that deserves to be known by name.

reviews.author: Colin Anderlohr
reviews.text: Delicious!  We started with house margs and had the Chicken Protein Bowl and the Carnitas plate.  Carnitas were so darn good.  Salsa bar had such a great bite to it!  We will be back.

reviews.author: Elavan
reviews.text: El Pueblo Mexican Food is one of my favorite spots to visit. The vibe of the place is truly beautiful, warm, inviting, and perfect for any occasion. The bar is top-notch, and with plenty of TVs around, it’s also a great place to catch a game. The food overall is very good, but the real star here is the fish tacos. At only $1.39 each, they are simply unbeatable, not just in San Diego, but anywhere in California

reviews.author: Andrew Barrera
reviews.text: Cherry was most helpfully with ordering. Wasn’t sure what to get since it was our first time here. Recommend the fish tacos! Delicious!!!

reviews.author: Panita S.
reviews.text: Stop by this place after work out. Felix very helpful getting our breakfast ready to go. Love the variety of fresh made sauce. nice and clean place.

del-mar.name: El Pueblo Mexican Food & Bar - Del Mar

reviews.author: E M
reviews.text: 1st time here and will be returning for sure! The fish tacos were amazing and the best price in town! Only $1.39 per fish taco! Unbelievable!  I ordered 3 and made it a combo by adding side or rice and beans. All under $10!  They have a salsa bar and a nice selection of drinks. Including horchata and Jamaica water! There's indoor seating. And covered patio.seating as well . Its right off.  Location is also convenient close to the 5 fwy!

reviews.author: Zan Lee
reviews.text:
I grew up in San Diego, went to college in the Bay Area, and live in Los Angeles currently so feel that I really know good Mexican food and can honestly say this is some seriously delicious Mexican. I grew up in the area so I’ve been coming to this shopping center for decades, and I’ve seen all the different restaurants in this location and would say this is probably my favorite of the bunch so far. Inside is really large, they have a full bar, a full salsa bar, and a ton of seating options. You place your order at the counter and they either bring it to you or you can choose to go. Service was very fast and friendly, and my favorite part was how delicious it was.

The salsa itself was also very good, I still think Roberto‘s has the best salsa in town, but El Pueblo has better burritos. I was actually impressed with how good the food was. This morning we stopped in for fish tacos and breakfast burritos and thought they were fantastic. The fish taco is a little bit smaller than you usually get here in town but had great flavor and the breakfast burritos both the chorizo and the bacon were delicious. The tortilla was also very fresh and I already want to come back soon to try a Cali or a Carne Asada burrito. I would highly recommend to anyone and will be back many times in the future.

reviews.author: Alaura S.
reviews.text:
Hadn’t been here since it was the make-your-own pizza place — I can’t believe they’ve been here for 8 years now!
We sat at the (small) bar and totally lucked out with Joe as our bartender. He was awesome — super attentive, checked in on us (and everyone) often, and provided fast service. You can tell he really cares about the patrons. He also makes great drinks. The Paloma is one of his specialties, and I also tried the Siesta from their feature menu of the month (Jan 2026), which was really good. I was a little hesitant to try the Paloma because some places make it too tart, but his was very well balanced. Same with the Siesta — I thought it might be lime-forward and tart, but it was surprisingly smooth and balanced.
They have a full bar, so if you’re not into beer, there are plenty of other options. They also have an outdoor patio area, which is great for families or kids’ sports teams after a game.
Good Mexican food without restaurant-level prices. I’d say it’s like an upscale taco shop, but better. The staff is really nice and friendly, and there are lots of regulars. They also have TVs in the bar area and show UFC fights, so check their website for details.
It does get really busy, which is great for the business, but they have a good system to move people along. You order at the front, and if the bar area isn’t too busy, they’ll call you over and assist with your order. They currently have happy hour every day from 2pm–7pm and again from 11pm–12am for late-night happy hour.
Great place to go!

reviews.author: Ronald Magtanong
reviews.text: Amazing Mexican Food. Great place to go when you're waiting for kids to finish soccer practice or games nearby the Del Mar Surf Sports Park. The staff here is also extremely friendly and knowledgeable, including Jeremiah Funes. Great ambience, great food, great people.

reviews.author: Britney Ramirez
reviews.text: Came to el pueblo Mexican food very hungry and I was very satisfied. Abraham B Helped us out he was kind and attentive so was the rest of the staff definitely would come again. Fish tacos are amazing!! P.s the cookies are delicious
